name: codedrobe-one-shot-theme-skill
description: Composable CodeDrobe skills for creating, finding, installing, switching, verifying, and submitting Codex themes.

scripts.test: npm run test:skill && npm run test:catalog-skills && npm run test:submitter && npm run test:windows-helper
scripts.test:catalog-skills: node skills/codedrobe-theme-finder/scripts/self-test.mjs && node skills/codedrobe-theme-manager/scripts/self-test.mjs && node skills/codedrobe-theme-manager/scripts/apply_theme.mjs --theme /tmp/sample.codedrobe-theme --dry-run --platform darwin && node skills/codedrobe-theme-manager/scripts/apply_theme.mjs --theme 'C:\Themes\sample.codedrobe-theme' --dry-run --platform win32 && node skills/codedrobe-theme-manager/scripts/restore_theme.mjs --restart-existing --dry-run --platform darwin && node skills/codedrobe-theme-manager/scripts/restore_theme.mjs --restart-existing --dry-run --platform win32
